message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor "Cache" as Cache
actor "DiskLruCache" as DiskLruCache
actor "JournalFile" as JournalFile
actor "DiskLruCache.Entry" as DiskLruCacheEntry
actor "LinkedHashMap" as LinkedHashMap
actor "Snapshot" as Snapshot
actor "Cache.Entry" as CacheEntry
actor "Response" as Response
actor "CacheResponseBody" as CacheResponseBody

activate Cache
activate DiskLruCache

Cache -> DiskLruCache: get()
activate DiskLruCache

DiskLruCache -> DiskLruCache: initialize
DiskLruCache -> JournalFile: read
JournalFile --> DiskLruCacheEntry: 
DiskLruCacheEntry --> DiskLruCache: 
DiskLruCache -> LinkedHashMap: put()
LinkedHashMap --> DiskLruCache: 
DiskLruCache -> LinkedHashMap: get()
LinkedHashMap --> DiskLruCache: 
DiskLruCache --> Snapshot: 
Snapshot --> Cache: 

Cache --> Cache: response()
CacheEntry --> Response: 
Response --> CacheResponseBody: 
CacheResponseBody --> Cache: 

deactivate Cache
deactivate DiskLruCache

@enduml
